response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and DLang developer but fundamentally lacks the core requirements for this position. They do not have the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ experience on Windows, possessing only 7 months of professional C/C++ experience from a decade ago. Additionally, they lack the required Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income domain expertise.
strengths: Over 10 years of broad software engineering experience across various tech stacks.
Demonstrated proficiency with CI/CD pipelines, DevOps, and testing methodologies like TDD.
Some exposure to financial technology through work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience, heavily favoring Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang.
No evidence of Windows platform development experience; primarily focused on Linux and web environments.
Missing required domain expertise in Fixed Income, Derivatives, or Capital Markets.
